enrichment.summary: Kyle announces a new daily news commentary series called 'News with Kyle,' done by request. He scrolls through Huffington Post articles and reacts to stories on Mexico's drug war, gravity waves, and the 2016 US presidential primary race, commenting on Trump, Bernie Sanders, Marco Rubio, Hillary Clinton, and Jeb Bush.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: blames illegality of drugs for the violence — it's the people's fault for making drugs illegal

stances.topic: Bernie Sanders vs Trump general election
stances.position: expects it will be Bernie vs Trump and thinks that would be a good matchup
thinks he's effectively done after getting caught repeating the same scripted speech twice

stances.topic: Jeb Bush calling Trump a loser
stances.position: thinks Bush should have been more serious since Trump is actually winning
thinks everyone should do personal news commentary to stay informed and keep a record of their opinions

claims.subject: News with Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle announces the return of 'News with Kyle' by popular request.

claims.subject: News with Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle plans to do 'News with Kyle' every single day, similar to how he did it last time.

claims.subject: News with Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle will look at top news articles, have them read to him while working, and include segments from his own and others' videos.

claims.subject: Kyle Colinski
claims.claim: Kyle mentions including Kyle Colinski from Secular Talk in his news segments because he likes to include those pieces.

claims.subject: YouTube channel
claims.claim: Kyle considers creating a channel dedicated to flips of all machines for historical preservation.

claims.subject: News with Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle acknowledges he might not be the best newscaster but embraces being a new and unique style of newscaster.

claims.subject: Huffington Post
claims.claim: Kyle mentions browsing Huffington Post for news stories but forgets which one he looked at previously.

claims.subject: Drug war
claims.claim: Kyle criticizes the drug war, mentioning 46 bodies found in 2014 and a massacre in 2010, blaming the system for making drugs illegal.

claims.subject: Gravity waves
claims.claim: Kyle finds it interesting that scientists are still discussing whether gravity waves exist.

claims.subject: Untricks videos
claims.claim: Kyle watches Untricks videos, including one discussing a potential war scenario involving present-day figures.

claims.subject: Bernie Sanders
claims.claim: Kyle jokes about Bernie Sanders having a little arm to cover all bases in a political scenario.

claims.subject: Trump vs. Rubio
claims.claim: Kyle comments on Trump leading and Rubio almost out of the race after being caught repeating the same speech.

claims.subject: George Bush
claims.claim: Kyle mentions George Bush being called a 'loser' on a talk show but thinks the description should have been more serious.

claims.subject: Hillary Clinton
claims.claim: Kyle notes Hillary Clinton's accusation that Bernie Sanders took money from backers.

claims.subject: News with Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle admits the show is a work in progress and will improve over time.

claims.subject: YouTube uploads
claims.claim: Kyle feels pressure to make sure his YouTube uploads are good but acknowledges the challenge of doing so while still learning.

claims.subject: News with Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle believes doing daily news helps keep him informed and provides a record of his thoughts on current events.

claims.subject: YouTube channel
claims.claim: Kyle considers creating a separate YouTube channel for his news but decides to wait for now.

claims.subject: Video length
claims.claim: Kyle aims to keep his videos between five and twenty minutes, depending on the content.
